name: CAISSE DES DEPOTS ET CONSIGNATIONS – CDC
description: Public financial institution (Etablissement public financier) founded in 2011, managing 50 million Tunisian Dinar in funds and investing across all sectors in Tunisia.

### À propos
L’ATIC fédère et représente les opérateurs Tunisiens du Capital investissement ce qui lui confère une forte légitimité en qualité de porte-parole de la profession auprès des pouvoirs publics.
* [](https://www.facebook.com/Association-Tunisienne-des-Investisseurs-en-Capital-360045507411602/)
* [](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCt0oQoKZdG63Ksac3hUtWtw)
### newsletter
Abonnez vous à notre newsletter pour être à l’affut des dernières nouvelles de l’ATIC
Laissez ce champ vide si vous êtes humain :

tavily.query: CAISSE DES DEPOTS ET CONSIGNATIONS – CDC
tavily.answer:
The Caisse des Dépôts et Consignations (CDC) is a French public financial institution founded in 1816, serving the public interest and supporting economic development. It manages social housing and pension schemes, and acts as a trustee for public and private entities. CDC is governed by the French Parliament.
Caisse des Dépôts et Consignations (CDC) is a French public financial institution offering long-term investments and financial services. It has significant stakes in various French companies and supports economic development. CDC is headquartered in Paris.
Caisse des Dépôts et Consignations (CDC) is a French public financial institution founded in 1816, offering financial services and supporting economic development. It has €1.03 trillion in assets and is headquartered in Paris. CDC is a state-owned entity with a unique legal status.
Caisse des Depots et Consignations (CDC) is a French public financial institution offering diverse financial services, headquartered in Paris, with over 360,000 employees. CDC focuses on long-term investments and public interest missions, including social housing and pension management. Established in 1816, CDC is a key player in sustainable development and economic growth.
Caisse des Dépôts et Consignations (CDC) is a French public financial institution created in 1816, serving as the investment arm of the French State. It manages long-term investments and public pension schemes, with headquarters in Paris. CDC holds significant stakes in various French companies and has substantial assets.

normalized_name: caisse des depots et consignations cdc
